description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a round, reddish-brown terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The plant itself has a single central stem from which multiple long, slender green stalks radiate outward, each supporting a large, flat, circular green leaf. The leaves are evenly distributed around the plant, giving it a balanced, bushy appearance. The pot is plain and unadorned, with a slightly flared rim and a smooth surface. The soil is visible at the top of the pot, and the plant appears healthy and well-maintained. There are no visible labels, decorations, or additional accessories attached to the pot or plant.
description: A small, bushy potted plant with large, round green leaves on long stems, set in a plain terracotta pot with visible soil.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from above and slightly to the side, showing the central stem and the radial arrangement of the leaves, with the pot and soil clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the dense cluster of leaves on one side, partially obscuring the pot, and shows the plant's overall round silhouette.
description_view_2: The plant is viewed from the opposite side, revealing more of the pot and the spread of the leaves, with the soil and stem visible.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the overlapping leaves and the central stem, with the pot rim and soil still visible but less prominent.
